projectDescription: A PPX (preprocessor extension) and runtime library that brings type-safe styled components and CSS-in-code to ReScript, Melange, and OCaml.
keyFeatures: Type-safe CSS via a built-in CSS parser and type-checker
Styled components for ReScript, Melange, and OCaml/native
PPX macro expansion — zero-cost abstraction over emotion.sh
Interpolation with type holes for type-safe CSS values
Array API for composable, reusable CSS rules
Server-side rendering support for OCaml/native via styled-ppx.native
VSCode and Vim editor extensions for CSS syntax highlighting
publicApiSurface: %styled.div / [%styled.div] — create a styled React component from an HTML element
%cx / [%cx] — generate a className string from CSS declarations
CSS module — runtime values and property functions (CSS.px, CSS.hex, CSS.opacity, etc.)
CSS.unsafe — escape hatch for unsupported CSS properties
CSS.get_stylesheet() — get the full stylesheet as a string (native)
CSS.style_tag — React element rendering a <style> tag (native/SSR)
CSS.get_string_style_hashes() — get space-separated style hashes for hydration
